claim_boundary: v6.0.3 derives the sigma quadratic-operator architecture and a finite family of admissible conditional sources. The parent action does not select their couplings, coefficients, physical signature, or a stable phase.

rows.classification: conditional geometric scalarization, not enclosed energy
rows.scalar_status: R and Lovelock densities are diffeomorphism scalars
rows.source_status: P1 permits xi_1; P2/P3 permit higher Lovelock couplings but do not require them

rows.hessian: alpha_2 T when A(0)=1 and A'(0)=0
rows.scalar_status: T=G^AB T_AB is a scalar after parent matter variation
rows.source_status: action-native if a parent matter action and A(sigma) are supplied

rows.coefficient_dimension: f dimensionless in the direct multiplicative convention
rows.scalar_status: L_m is a scalar density representative but is not representation invariant
rows.source_status: rejected unless additive/redefinition invariance is closed

rows.action_term: sigma^2 J_AJ^A or matter[A^2G+B^2 u u]
rows.scalar_status: J_AJ^A and T_AB u^A u^B are scalars only after their fields are supplied
rows.source_status: requires action-derived current/timelike field and normalization

rows.action_term: interface functional whose variation yields Delta p_n
rows.scalar_status: Delta p_n is an interface scalar after normal and two sides are defined
rows.source_status: blocked before a dynamic interface and normal exist

rows.action_term: sigma^2 times T, T_ABT^AB, or trace-free square
rows.coefficient_dimension: T^2 coupling needs [A]^-1 L^8 for dimensionless sigma
rows.source_status: higher matter operators need new scales and a parent variational definition

rows.classification: local F^2 or global Q source
rows.domain: bulk M8 locally or global charge sector
rows.hessian: opposite ensemble response for fixed f and fixed Q
rows.scalar_status: F_d^2 is local scalar; Q is an integrated global invariant
rows.source_status: conditional; no BHSM top-form source selected

rows.action_term: boundary/collar sigma^2 K, K^2, Tr(S^2), strain, or J terms
rows.classification: interface source only when independent action term exists
rows.scalar_status: complete contractions are boundary scalars after embedding and foliation declaration
rows.source_status: variational completions are coefficient locked, not free tension

rows.action_term: mode projection C_mn=<f_m,Xi_total f_n> derived from the same local parent action
rows.classification: candidate spectral selection theorem, not an additional guessed local scalar
rows.coefficient_dimension: same operator dimension as diagonal Hessian eigenvalues
rows.domain: mode space of the declared self-adjoint bulk/interface problem
rows.scalar_status: C_mn is basis-covariant matrix data derived by invariant inner products
rows.source_status: requires derived spectrum, nonzero off-diagonal overlaps, phases/coherence, and a control variable

selection_hypothesis: constructive harmonic coherence may select an eigenchannel only if C_mn and its phase-sensitive off-diagonal entries follow from the parent action
